ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the model */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was first produced */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "row_spacings" (
  "row_spacing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row spacing */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the row spacing belongs to */,
  "row_spacing" TEXT /* Row spacing value (e.g., 6R30, 8R30) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the row spacing */,
  "max_row_spacing" REAL /* Maximum row spacing for the model */,
  "min_row_spacing" REAL /* Minimum row spacing for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_spacing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_row_spacings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the meter belongs to */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter (e.g., Positive Air, Vacuum Electric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meter */,
  "max_flow_rate" REAL /* Maximum flow rate of the meter */,
  "min_flow_rate" REAL /* Minimum flow rate of the meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hopper_capacities" (
  "hopper_capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hopper capacity */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hopper capacity belongs to */,
  "hopper_capacity" TEXT /* Hopper capacity value (e.g., 2 or 3 (70 or 106)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hopper capacity */,
  "max_capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the hopper */,
  "min_capacity" REAL /* Minimum capacity of the hopper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hopper_capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hopper_capacities_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizers" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the fertilizer belongs to */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer (e.g., Liquid, Granular) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilizer */,
  "max_application_rate" REAL /* Maximum application rate of the fertilizer */,
  "min_application_rate" REAL /* Minimum application rate of the fertilizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertilizers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "row_spacing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row spacing the configuration belongs to */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter the configuration belongs to */,
  "hopper_capacity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hopper capacity the configuration belongs to */,
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fertilizer the configuration belongs to */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is the default for the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_hopper_capacity_id FOREIGN KEY ("hopper_capacity_id") REFERENCES hopper_capacities ("hopper_capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_row_spacing_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_spacing_id") REFERENCES row_spacings ("row_spacing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_fertilizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("fertilizer_id") REFERENCES fertilizers ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, sales, customer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
